name: Keep it fluffy bubble bar
description: A generously bubbly bubble bar that lives up to its name, creating a fluffy, pillowy bath full of soft, skin — softening bubbles with a delightful lingering fragrance.
archive_note: The Peachy concept originated in Lush's 2019 Valentine's line alongside the Aubergine bath bomb, becoming one of the most talked-about seasonal releases of that year
nostalgia_angle: Peachy has a cheeky Valentine's legacy stretching back to 2019, making it a fan-favourite returning seasonal treat
throwback_reference: Companion piece to the iconic Aubergine bath bomb from the 2019 Valentine's collection
